rule_metadata.name: empire
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'empire' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule empire
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'empire' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "empire"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /\s\$FodHelperPath/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = " -AgentDelay " nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = " -AgentJitter " nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = " -bootkey " nocase ascii wide
		$string5 = /\s\-ChildPath\s.{0,1000}fodhelper\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string6 = /\s\-ChildPath\s.{0,1000}sdclt\.exe/ nocase ascii wide
		$string7 = " -CollectionMethod stealth" nocase ascii wide
		$string8 = " -ComputerName -ServiceEXE " nocase ascii wide
		$string9 = " -ConType bind " nocase ascii wide
		$string10 = " -ConType reverse " nocase ascii wide
		$string11 = " -CShardDLLBytes" nocase ascii wide
		$string12 = /\s\-DllName\s.{0,1000}\s\-FunctionName\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string13 = /\s\-Domain\s.{0,1000}\s\-SMB1\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string14 = " -DoNotPersistImmediately " nocase ascii wide
		$string15 = " -DumpCerts " nocase ascii wide
		$string16 = " -DumpCreds " nocase ascii wide
		$string17 = /\s\-DumpForest\s\-Users\s.{0,1000}krbtgt/ nocase ascii wide
		$string18 = " -ElevatedPersistenceOption " nocase ascii wide
		$string19 = /\sempire\.arguments/ nocase ascii wide
		$string20 = /\sempire\.client\./ nocase ascii wide
		$string21 = /\sempire\.py/ nocase ascii wide
		$string22 = /\s\-Enumerate\s.{0,1000}\s\-Module\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string23 = " -ExeArguments " nocase ascii wide
		$string24 = /\s\-FullPrivs\s.{0,1000}\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string25 = /\s\-GHUser\s.{0,1000}\s\-GHRepo\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string26 = /\s\-Hosts\s.{0,1000}\s\-TopPorts\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string27 = " http_malleable" nocase ascii wide
		$string28 = " -ImpersonateUser " nocase ascii wide
		$string29 = " -ImportDllPathPtr " nocase ascii wide
		$string30 = " Inveigh-" nocase ascii wide
		$string31 = " -JMXConsole -AppName " nocase ascii wide
		$string32 = " -KillDate " nocase ascii wide
		$string33 = " -KillDays " nocase ascii wide
		$string34 = " -LLMNRTTL " nocase ascii wide
		$string35 = /\s\-LNKPath\s.{0,1000}\s\-EncScript\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string36 = " -mDNSTTL " nocase ascii wide
		$string37 = " -NBNSTTL " nocase ascii wide
		$string38 = " net localgroup administrators Tater /add" nocase ascii wide
		$string39 = " -NoBase64 " nocase ascii wide
		$string40 = " -NoP -sta -NonI -W Hidden -Enc " nocase ascii wide
		$string41 = " -p 1337:1337 -p 5000:5000" nocase ascii wide
		$string42 = " -PasswordList " nocase ascii wide
		$string43 = /\s\-payload\s.{0,1000}\-Lhost\s.{0,1000}\-Lport/ nocase ascii wide
		$string44 = " -PayloadPath " nocase ascii wide
		$string45 = /\s\-PEPath\s.{0,1000}\s\-ExeArgs\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string46 = " -PermanentWMI " nocase ascii wide
		$string47 = " -PersistenceScriptName " nocase ascii wide
		$string48 = " -PersistentScriptFilePath " nocase ascii wide
		$string49 = " --port 1337" nocase ascii wide
		$string50 = " -PWDumpFormat " nocase ascii wide
		$string51 = " -Registry -AtStartup " nocase ascii wide
		$string52 = " -RemoteDllHandle " nocase ascii wide
		$string53 = " -RevToSelf " nocase ascii wide
		$string54 = /\s\-Rhost\s.{0,1000}\s\-WARFile\shttp/ nocase ascii wide
		$string55 = /\s\-Rhosts\s.{0,1000}\s\-Password\s.{0,1000}\s\-Directory\s.{0,1000}\s\-Dictionary\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string56 = /\s\-Rhosts\s.{0,1000}\s\-Path\s.{0,1000}\.txt\s\-Port\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string57 = " -ScheduledTask -OnIdle " nocase ascii wide
		$string58 = /\s\-ServiceName\s.{0,1000}\s\-PipeName\s/ nocase ascii wide
		$string59 = " Set-MasterBootRecord" nocase ascii wide
		$string60 = /\s\-SiteListFilePath\s.{0,1000}\s\-B64Pass\s/ nocase ascii wide

		$string68 = /\s\-Username\s.{0,1000}\s\-Hash\s.{0,1000}\s\-Command\s/ nocase ascii wide

		$string70 = " -VaultElementPtr " nocase ascii wide
		$string71 = " windows/csharp_exe" nocase ascii wide
		$string72 = " -WorkingHours " nocase ascii wide
		$string73 = " Your payload has been delivered" nocase ascii wide
